pages.text: The assembled product of the Spell Workbench. Contains a carrier, an element, and optionally an effect and base multipliers.$(br2)Load into a wand via Shift+Right-click. The scroll is consumed.
Tooltip shows the carrier type, element type, effect (if any), power/cooldown multipliers, and total mana cost. Scrolls with an effect module have enchantment glow.
